epigraph: “The early morning has gold in its mouth.” — Franklin

messages.preview:

lead.headline: Teresa's resignation requires immediate attention
lead.deck: This personnel change sits unresolved in your task list with no due date or urgency marker, yet it's a staffing matter that typically demands swift action. Without clarity on timing and transition planning, this could create operational gaps across your team.
